headline: Why 1 Technical Strategist Thinks Archer Daniels Midland Could Be the Most Explosive Stock to Buy Here

headline: Grocery shock on the horizon for approaching U.S. elections as Iran war drags on
summary: "It just pisses them off more," said Rep. Vicente Gonzalez, D-Texas, said in an interview when asked about how voters will react if food gets more expensive.

headline: BMO Capital Adjusts ADM Estimates, Notes Margin Recovery in March
summary: Archer-Daniels-Midland Company (NYSE:ADM) is included among the 14 Cheap DRIP Stocks to Buy Now. On March 25, BMO Capital analyst Andrew Strelzik raised the firm’s price recommendation on Archer-Daniels-Midland Company (NYSE:ADM) to $65 from $63. It maintained a Market Perform rating on the shares. The update came as part of a broader note on Agribusiness […]
